overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a foggy grassland at night. The camera moves from a dirt path into tall grass, with low visibility due to dense fog and darkness. Appears to be game engine footage, possibly from a horror or exploration game.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy meadow edge with dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a dirt path through foggy grassland at night

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail running along the right side of the frame
tall grass covering the open meadow
low-lying white fog hovering above the grass
dark silhouettes of trees on the horizon
faint orange light source visible through the fog on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy grassland at night, with the camera walking alongside a dirt path on the right. A warm light glows faintly through the mist on the right side, while distant trees form a dark silhouette on the horizon. The fog creates a thick white layer hovering above the tall grass.

events.description: moves away from dirt path into tall grass field, leaving the trail behind

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through tall grass away from the path, moving deeper into the foggy field

segments.scene_description: Having left the dirt path behind, the camera moves deeper into the tall grass meadow. The warm light source is no longer visible, and the visibility remains low due to the persistent fog. The distant tree line shifts to the left as the camera advances through the dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal grassland that shifts from a guided path into the depths of a dense, foggy meadow. It begins by walking alongside a dirt path where a warm light glows faintly through the mist and dark silhouettes of trees line the horizon. As the camera leaves the path behind, the warm light fades from view and the environment becomes more oppressive. The scene then shifts deeper into the tall grass, where the visibility remains low and the distant tree line drifts to the left as the camera advances through the thick vegetation.
